reviews.review_text: Owner very friendly, assisted with parking caravan in and very chatty. Many permanent residents.

Absolutely not suitable as a caravan park not even as an overnight your far better off free camping.
Should be demolished, really should. Something very wrong with the reviews here,  very wrong.

Booked for three nights pulled in at 4.45 was gone at
8 am next day. As you can see we got 4 likes on our condemnation of this horrible disgusting place, little wonder my wife and I were arguing loudly as to why I used this filty caravan park my wife was furious at me that I booked into this disgusting place. My wife won the argument we left the following morning.

Enough said.
Was what we need for a couple of nights. It really is a prrmanent home park

Other places on the Island to stay.
Just a suggestion.
Great little park quiet and friendly
I actually live in caravan park the owners are nice and family friendly easy access to beach fishing swimming shops and walking distance

Best place we have ever stayed.
Mr Paul and Mrs Lisa are very helpful and friendly.
We have stayed here for around 2 weeks with 2 young kids .
The permanent residents here also so friendly and welcoming. John is very hard worker keeping the place clean and grass green ..
Paul is looked after us like their family.
We felt sad to say Good bye to this place .
We will come back again for sure .
Thank you everyone 🙏
Nice place. Friendly staff and helpful residents. Very flexible and accommodating.
I have been  living here for six months lovely clean friendly peaceful and owners and families are wonderful so glad i chose Bellara Caravan Park to buy a cabin.
Great park, staff are very friendly and helpful. The park is mainly permanents but it’s nice and quiet and we found the resident friendly. We will definitely be back
Such amazing staff and beautiful people, they made me and my girls feel so welcome and safe, thankyou for your kind generosity
